summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Advanced Gamma feature with Black-Scholes GEX calculation. All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend displays ZGL, Call Wall, Put Wall, and GEX Profile correctly but has a minor state update issue when switching symbols.

integration_issues.issue: Gamma panel data doesn't update immediately when switching symbols - requires clicking 'Refresh Analysis' button
integration_issues.workaround: Click 'Refresh Analysis' button after switching symbols

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/gamma/advanced/MES returns valid data with zgl, call_wall, put_wall, gex_profile
✅ GET /api/gamma/advanced/MNQ returns valid data
✅ GET /api/gamma/advanced/M2K returns valid data
✅ GET /api/gamma/advanced/MYM returns valid data with BELOW_ZGL signal
✅ GET /api/gamma/advanced/INVALID returns 404
✅ GET /api/gamma/MES returns basic gamma data with zgl, call_wall, put_wall
✅ POST /api/analyze with symbol MNQ returns real_gamma object with zgl, call_wall, put_wall, gex_profile
✅ POST /api/analyze with symbol MYM returns correct DIA underlying with BELOW_ZGL signal
✅ Frontend: Advanced Gamma panel renders with data-testid='advanced-gamma-panel'
✅ Frontend: ZGL box renders with data-testid='gamma-zgl' showing LONG Γ or SHORT Γ
✅ Frontend: Call Wall box renders with data-testid='gamma-call-wall' showing RESISTENCIA
✅ Frontend: Put Wall box renders with data-testid='gamma-put-wall' showing SUPORTE
✅ Frontend: GEX Profile bar chart renders with data-testid='gamma-gex-profile'
✅ Frontend: ZGL interpretation text renders correctly with data-testid='gamma-zgl-interpretation'
✅ Frontend: Net GEX value displays with data-testid='gamma-net-gex'
✅ Frontend: Sentiment badge displays with data-testid='gamma-sentiment-badge'
✅ Backend: Black-Scholes gamma calculation using scipy.stats.norm
✅ Backend: Symbol to underlying ETF mapping (MNQ->QQQ, MES->SPY, MYM->DIA, M2K->IWM)
✅ Backend: GEX values scaled to millions (1e6)
✅ Backend: numpy types converted via convert_numpy_types helper
✅ Backend: 5-minute cache per symbol working correctly
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix frontend state update issue - gamma data should refresh automatically when switching symbols without requiring manual 'Refresh Analysis' click

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all UI elements render correctly, minor state update issue)

test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: None required - uses real yfinance options data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced Gamma feature fully tested. Backend uses Black-Scholes formula via scipy.stats.norm to calculate gamma from yfinance options chains. Frontend displays ZGL (Zero Gamma Level), Call Wall (resistance), Put Wall (support), and per-strike GEX Profile bar chart. All data-testid attributes are in place for automated testing. Minor frontend issue: gamma data doesn't auto-refresh when switching symbols - user needs to click 'Refresh Analysis'.

feature_verification.zgl_calculation: Working - calculates where cumulative net GEX crosses zero
feature_verification.call_wall: Working - strike with highest call GEX (resistance level)
feature_verification.put_wall: Working - strike with highest put GEX (support level)
feature_verification.gex_profile: Working - per-strike GEX values for visualization
feature_verification.zgl_interpretation: Working - shows ACIMA/ABAIXO do ZGL with trading implications
